gaps.title: Any human evidence relevant to ageing/healthspan
gaps.why_it_matters: Without human evidence, claims remain preclinical.
gaps.how_to_close: At least one well-described human study (interventional or observational) with ageing/healthspan-relevant outcomes.

gaps.title: Randomised controlled trial evidence
gaps.why_it_matters: Randomisation reduces bias and strengthens causal claims.
gaps.how_to_close: At least one adequately powered RCT in a relevant population with pre-specified ageing/healthspan endpoints.

gaps.title: Clinically meaningful endpoints in humans
gaps.why_it_matters: Functional/clinical outcomes are harder to over-interpret than biomarkers.
gaps.how_to_close: Human studies measuring validated functional/clinical proxies (e.g., infections, frailty, gait speed) or hard endpoints.

gaps.title: Replication across independent human studies
gaps.why_it_matters: Replication reduces the chance that findings are spurious or context-specific.
gaps.how_to_close: Multiple independent human studies (ideally multi-site) with consistent direction on key endpoints.

gaps.title: Evidence in older adults / ageing-target populations
gaps.why_it_matters: Anti-ageing claims should be supported in older/adult ageing-relevant populations.
gaps.how_to_close: Trials/cohorts explicitly enrolling older adults (e.g., ≥65) or measuring ageing phenotypes.

gaps.title: Human safety / tolerability reporting
gaps.why_it_matters: Even if efficacy is promising, poor safety evidence limits real-world use.
gaps.how_to_close: Human studies or regulatory summaries reporting adverse events, tolerability and key risks.

gaps.title: Adequate duration for chronic use
gaps.why_it_matters: Short trials may miss delayed harms/benefits and do not reflect long-term use.
gaps.how_to_close: Longer-duration human studies (months to years) with follow-up.

gaps.title: Registered trials with results posted / publications linked
gaps.why_it_matters: Unreported completed trials can bias the evidence base (publication/reporting bias).
gaps.how_to_close: Ensure completed trials post results and/or link peer-reviewed publications (NCT→paper linkage).

gaps.title: Robust in vivo (animal) evidence
gaps.why_it_matters: Strong in vivo evidence improves biological plausibility and prioritisation.
gaps.how_to_close: Multiple independent animal studies showing healthspan/lifespan benefits with appropriate controls.
